article_title: Burnaby Council — 9.5. PSC - SU - Burnaby-New Westminster Task Force 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Status Update on Youth Sexual Exploitation Task Force
briefs.summary: Council is set to receive a status update on the Burnaby–New Westminster Task Force on Sexually Exploited and At-Risk Youth, a multi-agency group working since 1998 to protect children from sexual exploitation and support at-risk youth.
